summary: Phase 3 & 4 Follow-Up Intelligence UI Features - Backend APIs pass 14/14 tests. Frontend code review confirms all components correctly implemented. Browser automation crashes prevent direct UI verification (known environment issue from iterations 42-46).

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes during Playwright automation - prevents UI screenshots/interaction testing
integration_issues.notes: Known environment issue from iterations 42-46. Not a code issue - frontend compiles, APIs work, login redirects correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: TherapistOverview.js (lines 541-617) - Follow-Up Intelligence card with data-testid='followup-overview-card'
VERIFIED: TherapistOverview.js shows 4 stat counts: Booked, Recommended, Overdue, Dropout Risk
VERIFIED: TherapistOverview.js shows urgent clients list with data-testid='urgent-followup-{client_id}'
VERIFIED: MobileTherapistView.js (lines 146-178) - Follow-Up strip with data-testid='mobile-followup-card'
VERIFIED: MobileTherapistView.js HomeTab shows 4 status counts in grid (Booked, Due, Overdue, At Risk)
VERIFIED: AssistantDashboard.js (lines 505-550) - Follow-Up Intelligence card with data-testid='assistant-followup-card'
VERIFIED: AssistantDashboard.js shows 4 stats and urgent client tags
VERIFIED: ClientDashboard.js (lines 925-955) - Follow-up reminder card with data-testid='followup-reminder-card'
VERIFIED: ClientDashboard.js shows 'Book Your Session' button with data-testid='book-followup-btn'
VERIFIED: ClientDashboard.js shows different styling for overdue (red) vs recommended (blue)
VERIFIED: All frontend fetch calls use correct API endpoints with proper error handling

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100% complete - UI testing blocked by browser crashes

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing follow-up recommendations from Phase 1-2 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3-4 Follow-Up Intelligence UI features are implemented correctly. Backend APIs verified working with 14/14 tests passing. Frontend code review confirms all components have correct data-testid attributes and API fetch calls. Browser automation crashes prevent direct UI verification - this is a known environment issue, not a code bug.

GET /api/follow-ups/summary.notes: Returns booked=0, recommended=2, overdue=0, dropout_risk=0, total_clients=2

GET /api/follow-ups/clients.notes: Returns sorted client list with status, days_since_last_session, is_dropout_risk

GET /api/follow-ups/my-recommendation.notes: Returns has_recommendation=true, recommended_date, is_overdue for client Suman

TherapistOverview - followup-overview-ca.notes: Card shows when data exists, displays 4 stats + urgent clients list, clickable

MobileTherapistView - mobile-followup-ca.notes: Strip in HomeTab with 4 status counts (Booked, Due, Overdue, At Risk)

AssistantOverview - assistant-followup-c.notes: Card with 4 stats and urgent client tags

ClientDashboard - followup-reminder-card.notes: Shows when recommendation exists and no upcoming appointment, different styling for overdue vs recommended

browser_automation_results.dashboard_render: BLOCKED - Browser crashes after redirect (known environment issue)
